summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sketchario V4 new features: Media upload/library, DALL-E image generation, Admin console with Power Users & Release Notes, and Stripe billing. All backend APIs (23/23) and frontend features working perfectly.
passed_tests: Frontend: Admin Console with Power Users and Release Notes sections
Frontend: Billing page with 3 plan cards (Free, Creator 19EUR, Strategist 49EUR)
Frontend: Sidebar navigation with Piani and Admin items
Frontend: Content detail modal with Upload and DALL-E buttons
Frontend: Project view with all tabs (Calendar, List, Feed, Queue, Personas, ToV, Social)
Frontend: Media section in content detail modal
All existing Feed/RSS and Publishing Queue features
